payload.answer: I found a conflict: the existing memory says “Sara is my daughter,” while the new input says “Sara is my niece.” I can’t safely decide which is correct without your choice. Available actions are: approve_supersession to replace the existing relationship with the new one, keep_both to retain both statements despite the conflict, reject_new to keep the existing memory and discard the new input, or edit to clarify/correct the relationship.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to Sara, matching the existing Sara, but the relationship conflicts: daughter versus niece.

details: Conflict explanation provided using only the allowed safe actions.
